headlines.title: Suspected Attackers Strike Kuwaiti Oil Tanker Off Dubai Causing Fire Damage
headlines.summary: A Kuwaiti tanker full of oil caught fire off Dubai after sustaining damage Tuesday, one day after President Trump's threats against Iran. Owner warns of potential oil spill. Affects global shipping amid Iran war; heightens escalation risks for oil markets worldwide.

headlines.title: Spain Closes Airspace to U.S. Aircraft Supporting Iran War Operations
headlines.summary: Spain denies U.S. warplanes use of its airspace and Andalusia military bases amid U.S.-Israeli campaign against Iran. Impacts U.S. logistics in Europe. Signals growing allied divisions; may force rerouting and complicate operations.

framings.angle: Focuses on government decision to deny use of joint military bases
Highlights Spain's rejection of U.S.-Israeli war on Iran via airspace ban

headlines.title: Gulf Allies Urge Trump to Extend U.S. Bombing Campaign Against Iran
headlines.summary: Saudi Arabia and UAE push President Trump to prolong month-long U.S.-led strikes on Iran, citing insufficient weakening of Tehran. Affects U.S. policy decisions. Prolongation risks broader regional conflict and oil disruptions.

headlines.title: China Factory Activity Expands to 50.4 PMI in March Despite Iran War
headlines.summary: China's manufacturing PMI rises to 50.4 from 49, ending contraction, per National Bureau of Statistics. Workers and exporters benefit short-term. Prolonged Iran war threatens growth via supply chain strains.

headlines.title: Asian Nations Buy More Russian Crude Oil Amid Iran War Supply Crunch
headlines.summary: Oil-thirsty Asia competes for Russian crude as Iran war cuts 20% of global supply via Hormuz. Thailand, others face shortages. Shifts trade dynamics; boosts Russia while straining alternatives.

headlines.title: Myanmar Junta Leader Min Aung Hlaing Wins Lower House Vice-President Vote
headlines.summary: Coup leader elected vice-president Tuesday; another from military party, third by military. Presidential vote this week. Consolidates junta control; dims democratic hopes amid civil unrest.

headlines.title: Stampede Kills Eight at Nalanda Temple in Bihar During Prayers
headlines.summary: Eight die in crowd crush at Sheetla temple; Chief Secretary probes security lapses. Victims' families receive 600,000 rupees each. Exposes festival safety gaps in India ahead of probes.

headlines.title: U.S. Appeals Court Lifts Block on Trump DEI Crackdown Executive Orders
headlines.summary: Fourth Circuit panel pauses lower court ruling, deeming orders constitutional. Allows federal halt to diversity programs. Impacts government workers; advances conservative policy reshaping bureaucracy.

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Fire Gunshots Inside Goma Displacing Over One Million
headlines.summary: Rebels overrun troops prompting gunfire and shelling in safe-haven city per residents and U.N.
headlines.previousContext: Gunfire and shelling reported inside Goma as over one million displaced cram into the city

headlines.title: Israel Opens Military Zone Allowing Palestinians to Enter Northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Displaced Gazans cross bisecting zone on foot after hostage release deadlock breaks.
headlines.previousContext: Palestinians stream back on foot following breakthrough in hostage negotiations

headlines.title: NATO Deploys First Coordinated Units After New Baltic Sea Cable Cut
headlines.summary: Alliance responds to suspected sabotage campaign targeting infrastructure.
headlines.previousContext: Another deep-sea cable severed in Baltic Sea prompts NATO's initial coordinated action
